name: Atera MSP Platform API
what_it_does: Atera REST API for managed service provider (MSP) all-in-one platform combining RMM, PSA, and helpdesk. Enables AI agents to manage IT tickets and work orders, monitor device health and alerts, manage customer (client) accounts, trigger remote scripts and patches, retrieve billing data, manage SLAs, and integrate MSP operations data with external tools and reporting systems.
use_cases: Managing IT support tickets and escalation routing from helpdesk automation agents
Monitoring device health alerts and triggering remediation from IT operations agents
Managing MSP customer account data and billing from business operations agents
Triggering remote scripting and patch deployment from IT automation agents
not_for: In-house IT departments without MSP multi-tenant management needs
Enterprise ITSM without managed service provider workflows
Network operations centers without endpoint management focus
best_when: A managed service provider using Atera wants AI agents to automate ticket triage, device health monitoring, client communication, and patch management workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Remote device access and script execution capabilities require strict access controls. Unauthorized access to client systems is a critical security risk.

auth.notes: Atera uses API key authentication via X-API-KEY header. Keys are account-scoped with full MSP access across all clients. No granular scope control — treat as privileged credential with access to all managed endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 30-day free trial; API access on all paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-technician monthly pricing (not per-endpoint); Professional, Expert, and Master tiers
pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Unique per-technician pricing model vs per-endpoint. AI-native MSP platform. One of most affordable RMM/PSA platforms. 12,000+ MSP customers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; 500 requests per minute documented

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Remote access and scripting capabilities require strict access controls
No public MCP server — REST API with API key header
No granular scopes — API key grants full MSP access across ALL client endpoints
500 requests/minute rate limit — implement throttling for bulk device queries
Israeli company — EU and US data residency options; GDPR compliant
Per-technician pricing is unique — automation doesn't add per-endpoint cost
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: MSP platform with remote access to all client endpoints. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key with full account access — no scopes. Treat as highly privileged credential.

security_score_components.security_notes: MSP remote access platform. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key with no granular scopes — full access to all client endpoints. Highly privileged credential.
